chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.48 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For orders on M.A. No.635/25 2.For hg of case 14.01.2026. Mr. Habib Ahmed, Special Prosecutor ANF. Reportedly the case has reached final stage, even statement of accused under section 342 Cr. P.C. has been recorded and now the case is posted for recording evidence of defence witnesses. In the circumstances, this application for cancellation of bail has become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
